workLog.detail: Authored Proposed ADR-074 (bounded security-review quick-pass mode) for issue #2617. Routing decision: this ADR changes a security-sensitive contract (verdict taxonomy + PIV gate), so per .claude/rules/security.md it routes to the architect agent and the adr-review skill (ADR Review Protocol: 6-agent debate) plus human acceptance as the NEXT gate. The maintainer DEFER comment (issue #2617, 2026-06-17) explicitly mandated 'an ADR + phased impl' and 'security-agent review required before merge'. Per task constraints, the multi-agent adr-review debate is NOT run in this session; status stays Proposed and the PR records architect + adr-review + security-agent review as the next gate. ADR grounds every contract claim in verbatim canonical sources: templates/agents/security.shared.md lines 109-129/298 (threat-model protocol, APPROVED/CONDITIONAL/BLOCKED, PIV gate) and ADR-068 budget watchdog (SIGALRM, budget_exceeded).

ADR-074 is doc-only (no code, no tests to run). Validation performed: markdownlint-cli2 on the ADR file returned Summary: 0 error(s). Dash check (python3 byte count of U+2014/U+2013) returned emdash=0, endash=0, satisfying universal.md MUST-NOT-5. ADR number 074 confirmed free (no ADR-074-*.md existed). Frontmatter follows ADR-073 lifecycle schema (status: proposed). No pytest run because no executable code changed; the ADR records a decision and defers implementation to a future security-agent-reviewed change.

nextSteps: human acceptance to move status Proposed -> Accepted
phased implementation PR (classifier, watchdog, quick-pass, progress)
